sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Fountain Valley, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: inventory competition versus pending demand. Primary keyword: Fountain Valley housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Fountain Valley housing market; Fountain Valley real estate market update; Fountain Valley home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Fountain Valley; Fountain Valley home selling market; Fountain Valley homes for sale inventory; Fountain Valley days on market; Fountain Valley listing price; Fountain Valley seller market; Fountain Valley housing market 2026; Fountain Valley market update sellers; Fountain Valley median home price; are home prices dropping in Fountain Valley; is now a good time to sell in Fountain Valley. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
